title: Catacraft
description: Transforming the familiar landscapes of Minecraft into a hauntingly beautiful and treacherous wasteland, this data pack offers players a gripping post-apocalyptic survival experience.
body:
As you explore this desolate terrain, you'll encounter eerie remnants of civilization, crumbling structures, and the echoes of a once-thriving world now reduced to ruins. Danger lurks around every corner as hostile creatures fight for dominance in this unforgiving landscape. **Key features:** - **Scattered Ruins** : These ruins can hold loot that can't be found elsewhere, though it is mostly junk. - **Ruined Cities** : These cities are full of abandoned buildings full of loot! However, stay too long and you may be attacked by zombie hordes... - **Abandoned Suburban Zones** : Empty streets with houses can be found around the world. These can be found often around cities! - **Abandoned Survivor Camps** : Scattered throughout the world, these camps hold loot that can be vital for survival. - **Harsher Biomes** : Most biomes now don't spawn friendly animals, food is more scarse! - **More Zombies!** **Other Features included:**
  • Dead bushes slow down all entities.
  • Standing on an unsupported mangrove roots will cause the block to break!
  • Walking and sneaking on tall vegetation provides invisibility!
  • Running over dirt path blocks will provide Swiftness I.
  • Cobwebs now damage entities, similar to Sweet Berry Bushes!
  • Zombies can now break torches and glass blocks, spawn support zombies when attacked, and are stronger!
**More Zombies!**
  1. Farmer Zombie : Breaks crops when walking over them, these can spawn as Zombie Villager Farmers holding Wooden, Stone, or Iron Hoes.
  2. Miner Zombie : These spawn holding a pickaxe and break almost all everything except for wooden blocks!
  3. Lumberjack Zombie : These spawn holding axes and break wooden blocks!
  4. Shield Zombie : Spawns holding a shield that protects other zombies from arrows! Their shield breaks after a couple of attempts at breaking.
  5. Toxic Zombie : Spawns with an azalea over their head; while these walk slower than other zombies, they emmit a toxic aura that poisons nearby players!
  6. Infested Zombie : These spawn as zombies with a skeleton skull over their head; when players stay near them, silverfishes will spawn and target the nearest player!
  7. Nurse Zombie : These spawn wearing light blue leather armor. Nurse Zombies periodically heal nearby zombies; applying Instant Damage I.
  8. Baby Zombie Tower : Baby zombies can sometimes spawn in a "tower" formation. When in this state, a stack of five baby zombies will spawn, meaning 5x the trouble!
